description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🔄 Content Update (Published: June 2, 2026)

【CANCELLED】The special human rights consultation office planned for 'Human Rights Advocates Day' on June 3 has been cancelled due to the approach of Typhoon No. 6.

Original schedule was as follows:
Date and time: June 3 (Wednesday), 10:00 a.m.–3:00 p.m.
Location: Hanno Central District Administrative Center
Counsellors: Human rights advocates

This free consultation office handles inquiries about human rights issues including sexual harassment, power harassment, domestic violence, corporal punishment, bullying, online defamation, discrimination, and more.

We apologize for any inconvenience to those who were planning to use this service, and appreciate your understanding.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jinkenkurashianzen/11548.html
summary: ℹ️ 【CANCELLED】Special Human Rights Consultation Office for 'Human Rights Advocates Day' will not be held
